name: progressReport
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/construction.js, registerLensAction('construction','progressReport',...)) — reached only via /api/lens/run on key 'construction.progressReport' (3-arg handler, virtualArtifact.data === input). DETERMINISTIC: per-phase variance = actual − planned (parseFloat||0, so 'NaN'/absent → 0); status on-track/slightly-behind/behind-schedule by ±10 band; overall planned/actual = round(mean), overallVariance = round(meanActual − meanPlanned); projectStatus on-schedule/minor-delay/significant-delay. Empty/absent/non-array phases degrade graceful (guidance message — note an empty [] still hits the message branch so {ok:true} with no numeric result; the fuzz case uses {} expect). The GC-bench panel double-wraps; calcData() peels the layer so it computes identically. NOT macro-assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/construction-lens-macros.test.js.
